name: Main Block
description: The central administrative and academic block of VVCE.

name: CSE Department
description: Home to the Computer Science and Engineering department labs and classrooms.

name: Mechanical Block
description: Workshops and laboratories for Mechanical Engineering students.

name: ECE Department
description: Electronics and Communication Engineering department building.

name: Library
description: Central library offering a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources.

name: Canteen
description: Campus cafeteria serving meals and snacks for students and staff.

name: Sports Ground
description: Outdoor sports facility for cricket, football, and athletics.

name: Auditorium
description: Main auditorium for college events, seminars, and cultural fests.
